This module will provide a function called comports that returns an
iterable (generator or list) that will enumerate available com ports. Note that
on some systems non-existent ports may be listed.
Additionally a grep function is supplied that can be used to search for ports
based on their descriptions or hardware ID.
absolute_importN
comports
posixz;Sorry: no implementation for your platform ('{}') availableFc
    Search for ports using a regular expression. Port name, description and
    hardware ID are searched. The function returns an iterable that returns the
    same tuples as comport() would do.
    N)

search)

hwid
;/usr/lib/python3.9/site-packages/serial/tools/list_ports.py
grep'
Serial port enumeration)

?z%only show ports that match this regex)

typer
--include-linksz1include entries that are symlinks to real devicesz Filtered list with regexp: {!r}
